creator: erwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed with minor modification, thanks! 

The right way to test portversions is to use pkg_version(1): 
$ pkg_version -t 1.3 1.21 
< 
$ 

In these simple cases, you can avoid bumping PORTEPOCH by using 
some DISTNAME magic. Here I used: 
DISTNAME=               ${PORTNAME}-1.3
